title: B4/B8 R171 independent standard-library oracle protocol

recompute_rules.compensated_fsum: decode source_leaf_bits and recompute math.fsum with Python standard library
recompute_rules.tie_aware_1ulp: treat exact gap <= max source-score ULP as a tie and retain first-seen candidate

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: independent standard-library recomputation of committed R170 candidate records, source-return matches, and policy-change counts
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a new Qiskit execution, a production remedy, alternate search path, confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-input generality, hardware relevance, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
